title: normalizeName rejects some spec-valid header characters
body: new Headers().append('x-foo', 'bar') works fine, but header names using characters like `^` or backtick that are valid per the Fetch spec's field-name grammar throw 'Invalid character in header field name' because normalizeName's regex is stricter than the spec allows.

title: No support for streaming request bodies
body: Passing a ReadableStream as the `body` option to fetch() doesn't work in this polyfill -- it only handles Blob, FormData, URLSearchParams, ArrayBuffer/ArrayBufferView, and strings. We'd like to upload large files without buffering the whole body in memory first.

title: karma tests hang in headless Chrome on CI
body: test/karma.config.js works locally with ChromeHeadless but our Windows CI runner just hangs at 'Executing 0 of X SUCCESS' with no further output. Is there a known flag combination needed for karma-chrome-launcher on Windows runners?

title: Unclear whether AbortController/signal is supported
body: I don't see `signal` handled anywhere obvious in fetch.js, but some issues/PRs reference abort support. Could the docs clarify whether passing an AbortSignal in init actually cancels the underlying XHR, and if not, what the recommended workaround is?
